song_name: No More Tears Enough Is Enough
version_description: The song is in two distinct sections, the first being a slow free time ballad and the second a disco classic. For ease of reading the tab I have labelled the slower first section as an [Intro]. While not strictly true it should hopefully make things easier to follow - https://youtu.be/J5i2Dj5YO3Q.

content:
Donna Summer & Barbra Streisand - No More Tears (Enough Is Enough)(Paul F. N Jabara & Bruce Roberts)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you enjoyed this, please add it to your favourites and/or
give a rating to show appreciation for the work that went into providing it for you

The song is in two distinct sections, the first part (up to 1 minute 45 seconds in this version) being a slow
free time ballad and the second (the remaining 3 minutes, again in this version) a disco classic.
For ease of reading the tab I have labelled the slower first section as an [Intro].
While not strictly true it should hopefully make things easier to follow - for any of the much longer disco
versions of the song the sections simply repeat.

Video Here - https://youtu.be/J5i2Dj5YO3Q

             Hmmm, hmmm hmmm, Oooh oooh ooh[/tab]

 It's raining, it's pouring, My love life is boring me to tears, after all these years[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]                                                      [ch]Gm[/ch]
